architecture.summary: TMPDIR markers for session dedup, regex detection before LLM async, standalone section in hook

integrations.summary: project-detector gets vskillPlugins field for mobile rules, both paths check vskill.lock

ui-ux.summary: Separate bullets per plugin with description, consistent with LSP suggestion format

performance.summary: N/A - keyword regex is inherently fast, no LLM calls involved

security.summary: N/A - suggest-only mode, no command execution, word-boundary regex prevents partial matches

edge-cases.summary: Cap at 3 suggestions max, word-boundary for short keywords, substring for multi-word
